emender._comment: FULL-RANGE central warm start: width-multiprogramming geometry (nh=256, like m2rnn's regime), mixture fraction CENTERED f=0.5 so CMA (refinement sigma0*0.4=0.32 on the normalized 0-1 axis) reaches BOTH pure corners symmetrically: f->0 = pure gdn2_recall sea, f->1 = pure e97 split-edit. param-matched 1269.5M (-2.35%, within 3% tol). n_state PINNED 32, expansion 1.0. Searches dim/n_heads(32-2000)/depth/lr/batch + the full-range gdn2<->nonlinear mixture axis (0-1.0).
